panel_used: LDA bar chart (labeled panel 'C' in the image itself, though the caption text calls it panel B) showing LEfSe effect sizes for taxa differing between vaginally-delivered and C-section-delivered neonate meconium samples; panel A is PCA ordination (ignored) and the cladogram (labeled 'B' in the image / 'C' in the caption text) shows the same result without a directly readable flat taxon list, so the bar chart was used.
color_map: In the LDA bar chart legend: red = CS (C-section, group_1), green = V (vaginal delivery, group_0). This matches the cladogram's legend (red=CS, green=V) directly below it.
notes: Bar labels are legible with rank prefixes (p/c/o/f/g/s/t) as printed in the figure. The chart mixes multiple taxonomic ranks of the same lineages (e.g. Deinococcus at order/phylum/class/genus/family/species level all appear as separate bars) as LEfSe reports each rank independently; all are reported as shown, exactly as legible. 't_PRJNA15127' is a strain-level label (an NCBI BioProject accession used as an unclassified strain identifier, appears grouped with the Podoviridae/Pseudomonas phage F116 bars) reported verbatim since no cleaner name is legible.
